rationale: The cited paper appears once in the related literature as an example within a broad review of prior work on TV ad avoidance ("Deng and Mela (2018) uses microlevel data..."). The citing study does not build its suspense/surprise model, identification strategy, measures, or counterfactuals on that paper. There is no later engagement with its framework or findings beyond this background positioning, so the citation functions as a passing literature mention.
